name: French-Fried Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces almonds, slivered and finely ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the ice cream, almond mixture, and egg mixture.
3. Stir until well blended.
4. Pour the mixture into greased muffin tins or ramekins.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until set.
6. Allow to cool completely before serving.
